programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group debates the next step; Rick searches for a lost friend; Daryl and Merle question their choices; the Governor restores order.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they're running out of supplies, the group must make a choice when security is threatened; Andrea goes to the prison to attempt a negotiation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they are outgunned, Rick leads an expedition to get more weapons and fortify their group against the Governor and his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the Governor convene for a tense negotiation of a peace treaty between their respective groups, hoping to prevent more deaths.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor chases a fleeing dissenter; while the Governor is gone, a traitor tries to sabotage his plans.

programme.title: Giovani Santillan vs Angel Ruiz

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Jeff Harding vs Dennis Andries
programme.desc: On June 24th, 1989, Jeff Harding fought Dennis Andries for the WBC Light Heavyweight Title in Atlantic City. In an incredible back-and-forth fight with both fighters landing huge power shots, Harding surprisingly stopped Andries in the final round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs In Jin Chi
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001, Erik Morales fought In Jin Chi for the WBC Featherweight Title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles. Defending his title, Erik Morales put on the pressure to do enough to get the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Alexis Arguello vs Ray Mancini
programme.desc: On October 3rd, 1981, Alexis Arguello fought Ray Mancini for the WBC Lightweight Championship in Atlantic City, in a very close and exciting fight.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.desc: Tameka's brother Lil' Red stops by the house and asks King to join his grandfather's group, The Tams for a night. Meanwhile, Tip joins Deyjah in a baking class to perfect the homemade cupcake.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Shekinah moves into her new home, Tameka convinces her she needs home owner's boot camp. Back at the house, Tip is discouraged by his kids' lack of basketball skills and sets up a game with NBA star Josh Smith. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Fed up with Shekinah always saying she wants to be white, Tameka suggests they spend the day doing things white people do. Meanwhile, Tip discovers inappropriate pictures on his kids' social media accounts. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After attending their first NASCAR event, Tip and Tameka argue over who's the better driver. With each of their personal cars on the line, the whole family joins in on the competition. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: King, Major, and Precious are hired for their first paid gig at the circus. Under pressure, will the kids step up to the challenge? Meanwhile, Messiah and Domani try to use Tip's know how to start their own fashion line. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to make a unique workout video for people who don't like to work out. Meanwhile, Tip takes the boys to LA for some business and pleasure. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Six Degrees of Irritation
programme.desc: The guests introduce themselves and Flav tries to figure out what everyone is famous for.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Strange Love
programme.desc: It's Date Night at the Surreal Life mansion with the cast members pairing off in order to better get to know one another.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Battle of the Bands
programme.desc: It's a big day for The Surreal Life houseguests as they find out they will be performing in a Battle of the Bands, with the winning group receiving money for charity.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: The cast is driving down to San Diego to see Charo perform, but much to Flavor Flav's dismay, no one will let him behind the wheel of the motorhome.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Surf School
programme.desc: The cast is getting ready to leave San Diego and head for the beach, but before they can split, they must once again deal with Flav's insistence on driving.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Making the Single Part A
programme.desc: Flav and Brigitte make an effort at reconciliation before the cast learns they will record the first ever Surreal Life single.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Making the Single Part B
programme.desc: The cast is recording the first ever Surreal Life single. With 4 hours left to record their song, the conflict continues as Jordan records off-tune background vocals and a mouth trumpet courtesy of Dave.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Halloween Episode: Haunted Hospital
programme.desc: After a lazy day at the house the cast receives a late edition of The Surreal Times telling them they'll be working the graveyard shift at a hospital.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: The day starts with Flavor bragging to Dave about Brigitte climbing in bed with him the night before, “Hubba, hubba, baby girl.”

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Last Supper & Goodbyes
programme.desc: It's the last day in the Surreal Life house and Flavor Flav and Brigitte wake everyone up in characteristically loud fashion: rocking out on the drums.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Best and Worst
programme.desc: In this retrospective, the six Surreal Life cast members reflect on their time together and look back at the Best and Worst moments of the season.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: The Surreal Seven
programme.desc: Checker Cab driven by Reality TV uber-fan Kathy Griffin picks up each of the housemates and drops them off at the house.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: The Kids Are All Wrong
programme.desc: Verne faces the fact that he shouldn't drink, scooter and pee. Then, the cast confronts a pack of hyperactive rug rats who threaten to burn the mansion to the ground.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Dwarves, Horses & Bears, Oh My!
programme.desc: The cast heads into the wilderness, where they learn about horses, branding calves, and pooping in the woods.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Three Crushes
programme.desc: The cast returns from camping and discovers the mansion has been turned into a spa – albeit one run by a man with a questionable approach to issues of personal space.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Celebrity Pitch Fest
programme.desc: Adrianne continues to lust after a somewhat reserved Chris.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: Chris and Adrianne have a heart-to-heart, where Chris questions Adrianne's motives and it seems their relationship is doomed even before it begins.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Seven Celebrities of Death - Part 1
programme.desc: The cast discovers that they've got 24 hours to prepare for shooting a Kung Fu epic entitled SEVEN CELEBRITIES OF DEATH.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Seven Celebrities of Death - Part 2
programme.desc: At the movie set, Jane struggles to bring her vision to the silver screen, confronting slow-moving actors, technical problems and a mini-mutiny where Jane learns the harsh reality imposed by the clock.

programme.title: The Surreal Life
programme.desc: After an afternoon trip to the racetrack, where Chyna Doll experiences her own version of Pretty Woman with Marcus, the cast returns to the house and discovers that they've walked into the set of DIRTY LAUNDRY.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Get Out
programme.desc: The last day in the house has arrived. Friendships have been made and tested.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Lost Footage
programme.desc: Surreal Life 4 housemates (and real life couple) Christopher Knight and Adrianne Curry host this special that aims to answer the top 5 burning questions about the season.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: Reunion Special
programme.desc: Host Sally Jesse Raphael reunites the cast after months apart to discover what they've been up to since the show wrapped and answer some lingering questions.

programme.title: The Surreal Life: No Way It's Jose
programme.desc: An insecure Security guard, Andy Dick, greets, molests and offends our cast as they arrive for Season 5 of the Surreal Life.
